theory.intro: The formal multiplication algorithm multiplies a number by a one-digit number, working from the right and carrying when a column total is $10$ or more.
facts: Multiply the **ones** first, then tens, then hundreds.
If a column gives $10$ or more, write the ones digit and **carry** the tens.
Add any carried digit to the next column's product.
steps: Set out the number with the single digit beneath the ones place.
Multiply each digit by the one-digit number, right to left.
Carry where needed and combine to get the product.
